name: Make Me Ordinary
description:
“Hush, little star. Everyone's watching you...”

[ suffering celebrity ]

.

Fame is something everyone can enjoy; for the starving actors and aspiring celebrities who want to be a part of the popular media. But for those who have already gotten a taste of what popularity in this world is like, those like Ghibo, knows that it’s parasocial by default. Hard to breathe, hard to live with ease. As long as the public eyes are locked onto you, there is no escape from their hungry tongues.

[Art by: @0_m_8]

Summary:

Ghibo Arhuer is a 31 year old cat, who is a well-known actor. Acting is his passion, the reason why he wanted to become an actor. But, what he did not factor as an actor is the fame he would get as a side-product. Not only is it a liability for him, but it hurts him in public.

[week 12]
creator: shokokokok
